verify.value: Adjacent interfaces named with exact neighboring subsystem labels and connection details provided.

verify.value: Motor power lines and sensor/encoder signal lines run in separate channels or are spaced/crossed at right angles.
verify.rule: Power and signal wires run in separate channels or are spaced/crossed at right angles with the separation visible in routing geometry.
